name: Correction
about: Report incorrect metadata, attribution, source references, or license information
title: "Correction: "
labels: correction
---

## Page or Record

- Collection slug:
- Registry file:
- Outcrop page URL, if available:

## What Is Incorrect?

Describe the incorrect claim, attribution, source reference, license field, or display behavior.

## Correct Information

Provide the corrected text or metadata.

## Source References

Please link primary sources where possible.

- Source URL:
- Source organization:
- Relevant `refs[]` id, if known (e.g. `aws-registry`):
- Short excerpt, if needed:

## Rights / Attribution Concern

Check any that apply:

- [ ] Source license or terms are incorrect
- [ ] Required attribution is missing or wrong
- [ ] Page implies endorsement incorrectly
- [ ] Source-derived material is treated as Outcrop material
- [ ] Raw object/sample content should not be shown
- [ ] Other
